title: API-driven benchmark runner scaffold + scoring rubric (user-side review replaces paid evaluator)
test_commands: python -c "doc=open('docs/benchmark/scoring_rubric.md').read(); assert 'D7' in doc and 'D8' in doc, 'rubric missing D7+D8 (two-family + sycophancy)'; assert all(d in doc for d in ['D1','D2','D3','D4','D5','D6','D7','D8']), 'rubric missing one or more of 8 dimensions'; assert 'paid Layer-3 evaluator' in doc and 'REMOVED' in doc, 'rubric missing paid-evaluator-removal context'; print('rubric-OK')"

python -c "src=open('scripts/v6/benchmark/api_benchmark_runner.py').read(); assert 'POLARIS_BENCHMARK_LIVE' in src and 'PER_SYSTEM_USD_CAP' in src, 'runner missing live-flag or cost cap'; assert all(s in src for s in ['call_polaris','call_chatgpt_pro_dr','call_gemini_pro_dr']), 'runner missing system adapters'; assert all(s in src for s in ['score_factual_accuracy','score_citation_health','score_frame_coverage','score_contradiction_handling','score_refusal_calibration','score_user_traceability','score_two_family_agreement','score_sycophancy_resistance']), 'runner missing one of 8 scorers'; assert 'compute_match_or_beat' in src and 'aggregate_per_template' in src, 'runner missing match-or-beat or per-template aggregation'; print('runner-OK')"

artifacts.rationale: Question bank (160 questions: 20 per template × 8 templates, distributed 8 routine + 8 novel_synthesis + 4 adversarial per template) ships at Phase 3 entry, not Phase 0 prep. Runner accepts the bank via --questions arg; format documented in rubric §5.

Phase 3 entry activates LIVE_MODE=1; Phase 0 prep ships dry-run-verifiable scaffold only. Per Plan v13 §F (no SILENT fallback): live-mode stubs raise NotImplementedError so Phase 3 wiring is forced rather than silently bypassed.

open_bugs.summary: Phase-3-PARTIAL-honest: Phase 0 prep ships rubric (8 dimensions) + runner scaffold + ALL 8 deterministic scorers + per-template aggregation + match-or-beat verdict logic with insufficient-data guards + 36 smoke tests. The DEFERRED portion is purely live-data: question bank, real API runs, per-template-per-dimension aggregate VERDICT (which dry-run cannot produce since match-or-beat correctly returns INSUFFICIENT_DATA on zero-only data).
criteria_deferred: Phase 3 entry: write tests/v6/benchmark/question_bank.json (160 questions per rubric §5)
Phase 3 entry: set POLARIS_BENCHMARK_LIVE=1 + provision OPENAI_API_KEY + GOOGLE_API_KEY

Phase 3 entry: implement system adapters' live paths (call_polaris.invoke_run, call_chatgpt_pro_dr OpenAI client, call_gemini_pro_dr google-genai client) — currently raise NotImplementedError so Phase 3 wiring is forced not silently bypassed
Phase 3 close: aggregate per system × per template × per dimension, match_or_beat.verdict transitions from INSUFFICIENT_DATA to APPROVE / BELOW_BAR, user reviews + signs
open_bugs.resolution_path: Phase 3 entry wires + executes; this prep stays APPROVE'd as historical evidence; new full-task 3.5 verdict supersedes.

evidence_links.green_criterion: scripts/v6/benchmark/api_benchmark_runner.py — runner that calls 3 APIs side-by-side per Carney template, captures structured outputs, produces comparative scoring per Plan v13 §F dimensions
evidence_links.evidence: Runner ships 3 adapters (call_polaris, call_chatgpt_pro_dr, call_gemini_pro_dr) — each has Phase-0 dry-run path AND Phase-3-live-activation path stubbed (raises NotImplementedError so Phase 3 wiring is forced). All 8 deterministic scorers implemented (score_factual_accuracy, score_citation_health, score_frame_coverage, score_contradiction_handling, score_refusal_calibration with under-AND-over-refusal detection via GENERIC_REFUSAL_MARKERS, score_user_traceability, score_two_family_agreement, score_sycophancy_resistance). PER_SYSTEM_USD_CAP enforces Plan v13 §H halt #3 with cost_cap_reached recorded per response (NOT silent skip). run_benchmark fail-loud on missing/unknown required systems (POLARIS_BENCHMARK_ALLOW_PARTIAL=1 escape for debugging). compute_match_or_beat treats ties as wins (match-or-beat semantics: ≥). INSUFFICIENT_DATA verdict on dry-run zeros / missing competitor data / missing polaris dims (refuses false APPROVE). aggregate_per_system + aggregate_per_template + compute_match_or_beat all emitted in output JSON.

evidence_links.green_criterion: docs/benchmark/scoring_rubric.md — internal scoring rubric covering match-or-beat dimensions
evidence_links.evidence: Rubric covers 8 dimensions. §1 explains deterministic + measurable + transparent + system-agnostic discipline (anti-LLM-as-judge). §2 lists all 8 dimensions with match-or-beat bars: D1 factual_accuracy, D2 citation_health (composite: D2a quantity in Phase 0; D2b anchor-recall + D2c per-claim precision spot-check Phase-3-deferred per Plan v13 §F citation precision/recall match-or-beat language), D3 frame_coverage, D4 contradiction_handling, D5 refusal_calibration, D6 user_traceability, D7 two_family_agreement (POLARIS-unique), D8 sycophancy_resistance. §3 gives per-dimension formulas. §3.2 explicitly addresses citation precision/recall split and the qualitative-spot-check protocol for D2c. §4 aggregation rules. §5 question-bank format. §6 cost discipline (~$8-25 total replaces $8-12k paid evaluator). §7 Phase-3-PARTIAL-honest framing.

evidence_links.green_criterion: outputs/audits/manifests/3_5_prep_api_benchmark_runner.json — Phase-3-PARTIAL-honest manifest documenting: runner scaffold + rubric ready for Phase 3 invocation; live API run deferred to Phase 3 entry
evidence_links.evidence: This file. Phase-3-PARTIAL-honest framing in `substrate_honesty_attestation`. open_bugs[0] documents the Phase-3-deferred portion (question bank + live API runs + D3-D6 scorer wiring) with explicit resolution_path.

codex_findings_addressed: P1 iter-1 (rubric §2 missing two-family + sycophancy): rubric expanded to 8 dimensions. D7 two-family agreement (POLARIS-unique per CLAUDE.md §9.1 invariant 1) + D8 sycophancy resistance (per task 1.7 ELEPHANT-methodology baseline) added to §2 table with formulas in §3.
P1 iter-1 (BenchmarkQuestion missing fields): expected_refusal_patterns, expected_frames, has_known_contradictions, paired_prompt_id added to dataclass per rubric §5 schema.

P1 iter-1 (D3-D6 only as TODO): all 6 (now 8) deterministic scorers fully implemented — score_frame_coverage, score_contradiction_handling, score_refusal_calibration, score_user_traceability, score_two_family_agreement, score_sycophancy_resistance. Each anchored on a structured signal (regex / substring presence / paired-prompt fixture flag) per rubric §3.

P1 iter-1 (cost-cap breaks loop): run_benchmark now records `cost_cap_reached` SystemResponse for the capped system on subsequent questions and CONTINUES with other systems. Side-by-side comparison data preserved for the under-cap questions. Plan v13 §F (no SILENT fallback) honored.

P1 iter-1 (no per-template deltas / win counts): added aggregate_per_template() and compute_match_or_beat() — emits per-template polaris_avg vs best-competitor-avg, delta, polaris_wins boolean, win_count, template_count, verdict APPROVE iff ≥6/8 template wins on comparable-dimension average (D1+D2+D5+D8 per MATCH_OR_BEAT_DIMENSIONS set).

P2 iter-1 (manifest claimed dry-run smoke without committed tests): tests/v6/benchmark/test_api_benchmark_runner_smoke.py committed — 30 tests covering all 8 scorers, schema, cost-cap behavior, match-or-beat, end-to-end CLI dry-run. All 36 pass (PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest tests/v6/benchmark/).

P3 iter-1 (no committed tests): same as P2 above — 36 smoke tests committed across iter 1-5 fix work (initial 23, expanded to 30, expanded to 36 to cover Carney template enforcement, dry-run guards, NaN serialization, comp completeness); test_commands updated to include the pytest invocation.
substrate_honesty_attestation: Phase-3-PARTIAL-honest framing per Plan v13 §F (no SILENT fallback). This prep ships the orchestrator-completable portion of task 3.5 — the API runner scaffold + 8-dimension scoring rubric + ALL 8 deterministic scorers (D1 factual_accuracy, D2 citation_health, D3 frame_coverage, D4 contradiction_handling, D5 refusal_calibration with both under-refusal AND over-refusal detection, D6 user_traceability, D7 two_family_agreement POLARIS-unique, D8 sycophancy_resistance) + per-template aggregation + compute_match_or_beat() with INSUFFICIENT_DATA guard (refuses to declare APPROVE on dry-run zeros or missing competitor data, per Plan v13 §F) + run_benchmark fail-loud on missing/unknown systems + 36 smoke tests passing. Live API runs against POLARIS + ChatGPT 5.5 Pro DR + Gemini 3.1 Pro DR are explicitly deferred to Phase 3 entry — system adapters raise NotImplementedError in live mode so Phase 3 wiring is forced rather than silently bypassed. The paid Layer-3 evaluator is REMOVED per blockers.md §1 reconciliation 2026-05-03 — the user-side review of the runner's match-or-beat verdict at Phase 3 close IS the Layer-3 validation. No external retainer. No silent fallback. open_bugs[0] documents the Phase-3-deferred live-execution work with explicit resolution_path.
